steps.code:
<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
if ( class_exists( 'WC_Product_Simple' ) ) {
  $names = array( 'Pro Workbench XL', 'Industrial Heavy-Duty Shelf 200 cm', 'Bulk Industrial Cleaner 25 L' );
  foreach ( $names as $n ) {
    $p = new WC_Product_Simple();
    $p->set_name( $n );
    $p->set_status( 'publish' );
    $p->set_catalog_visibility( 'visible' );
    $p->set_regular_price( '' );
    $p->save();
  }
}
$page_id = wp_insert_post( array( 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_title' => 'Request a Quote', 'post_content' => '[request-a-quote]' ) );
$s = get_option( 'aga_settings', array() );
$s['kip_style_enabled'] = true;
$s['kip_preset'] = 'soft';
$s['kip_accent'] = '#f0834e';
$s['mode'] = 'add';
$s['hide_price'] = true;
$s['page_id'] = $page_id;
update_option( 'aga_settings', $s );
